description: In a multi-client 3PL warehouse, an operator needs to know which client owns the inventory in a specific location.

nodes.task_description: An operator scans a location barcode.
The WMS displays the item and quantity in that location.

expected_outcome.value: The system shows the inventory details.

nodes.task_description: The system also displays the name of the client who owns the inventory.

expected_outcome.value: The operator correctly identifies that the stock belongs to 'Client XYZ'.
